name: Salesforce
description: Query, create, and manage Salesforce CRM data including leads, contacts, accounts, opportunities, and custom objects through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires a Salesforce Connected App with OAuth 2.0 configured.

Admin setup:
1. In Salesforce Setup, go to App Manager and create a New Connected App
2. Enable OAuth Settings and set a Callback URL
3. Select OAuth scopes: 'Full access (full)' and 'Perform requests at any time (refresh_token, offline_access)'
4. Save and copy the Consumer Key (Client ID) and Consumer Secret
5. Note your Salesforce instance URL (e.g., https://your-domain.my.salesforce.com)

This template uses the official @salesforce/mcp package from the Salesforce CLI team, which provides 60+ tools for interacting with Salesforce orgs. It requires Salesforce CLI authentication — run 'sf org login web' to authenticate your org before use.

For sandbox environments, use https://test.salesforce.com as the authorization/token base URL instead of https://login.salesforce.com.
